_readme: Unified performance tracking — replaces post-log.json. Tracks what was generated, what was skipped and why, A/B hook test results, and feed rhythm data.

ab_test_results._readme: Tracks which hook variant (A/B/C) was chosen each session. Over time reveals which hook categories consistently win.

format_hook_wins._readme: Which hook category wins most per format. e.g. trojan-horse: {curiosity-gap: 3, vulnerability: 1}

skip_reasons._readme: Logged when a format is skipped and user gives a reason.

format_signals._readme: Soft signals from skip reasons. Values: situational / low-fit / timing / neutral.

feed_rhythm._readme: Tracks the last 10 posts to detect repetition in format, hook type, or emotional tone.
